content.stem: Look at this shape pattern: Circle, Square, Square, Circle, Square, Square, Circle. What shape comes next?
content.explanation: This is an ABB pattern where one Circle is followed by two Squares, then repeats. We just had Circle, so the next shape is the first of two Squares.

metadata.cognitive_skill: Complex repeating pattern recognition with unequal groups

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student confuses the unequal grouping and thinks the pattern continues with Circle instead of recognizing we're at the beginning of the BB part of the ABB sequence
Student gets confused by the unequal groups and thinks the pattern needs a new shape when the grouping doesn't match their expectation
Student confuses the unequal grouping structure and believes a completely different shape continues the pattern when they can't make sense of the ABB rhythm
